description_long: This necklace features a series of round, polished beads in varying sizes and colors, strung together on a delicate chain. The beads display a mix of marbled blue, turquoise, and yellow patterns, with some beads exhibiting a swirled, almost painterly effect. The arrangement alternates between larger, multicolored central beads and smaller, solid turquoise and deep blue beads, creating a visually dynamic rhythm. The necklace is displayed on a white, matte-finished bust, highlighting the vibrant hues and glossy finish of the beads. The clasp and connecting links at the back are metallic, likely silver or a similar metal, providing both durability and a subtle shine. The overall design is playful yet elegant, suitable for both casual and semi-formal urban settings.
description: A vibrant beaded necklace with marbled blue, turquoise, and yellow round beads, strung on a metallic chain. The glossy beads alternate in size and color, creating a lively and elegant accessory.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full arrangement of colorful beads, with the largest marbled beads centered and smaller turquoise and blue beads along the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the necklace, showing the thickness and curvature of the beads as they drape around the bust.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the metallic clasp and chain links, with the beads partially visible at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, displaying the alternating bead pattern and the necklace's drape.
